headline: How The Hilton (HLT) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Growth Initiatives
summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings is back in focus as the fair value anchor shifts from US$328.80 to US$340.75, giving you an updated reference point for where models now place the shares. This change sits within a flurry of Street activity, where several firms have lifted or fine tuned their Hilton price targets and at least one has trimmed its view to US$303 from US$306, highlighting a mix of optimism and caution. Read on to see how to track these moving targets and keep up with the evolving Hilton...
